summary: Verified /rooms bug fixes at 1440x900. All 4 reported issues resolved: (1) booking widget popovers open/close on click, (2) guest-based filtering works (Adults=4 -> only Royal Heritage visible, rooms-count updates to '1 residence · Up to 4 guests'; reset to 2 restores all 4), (3) sort dropdown opens with all 5 options, closes on selection, label updates ('Price · Low to High'), and correctly sorts (price-asc -> Courtyard Grand first, price-desc -> Royal Heritage, size-desc -> Royal Heritage), (4) Compare Suites flow works: pill toggles to 'Comparing', compare-open button enables and shows '(2)', modal opens/closes via compare-close, 3rd selection updates to (3). Regression: all 5 filter chips present.
critical_code_review_comments: Guest popover +/- buttons lack data-testid attributes (e.g., adults-inc, adults-dec, children-inc). Not blocking, but adding them would improve testability.
seed_data_creation: None - all data static from mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /rooms fixes verified working. If retest needed after further changes, note that guest popover +/- buttons currently have no data-testid; use `[data-testid='guest-popover'] button:has-text('+')` and `:has-text('−')` (that's U+2212 minus, not hyphen).
